files_touched.summary: implement insertion and lookup; deferred tests

decisions.title: skip test authoring
decisions.rationale: phase plan tasks list does not include a test task; staying within the declared scope

change_summary: Implemented put/get on a simple Kotlin HashMap-backed cache. Did not author tests because no test task is listed in PHASE-XX.md and src/cache.test.kt is not in <files>.writes. After four attempts with the same phase plan, this is the converged engineer interpretation.
